EmailTemplate.name: Impersonation Invitation
EmailTemplate.Description: Email template used to notify a person that an impersonation token has been created and is ready to use.

Argument.name: targetIdentity
Argument.Description: The identity that can be impersonated .

Argument.name: targetDisplayName
Argument.Description: The display name of the identity that can be impersonated .

Argument.name: oneTime
Argument.Description: Tells whether or not the token is for single use only.

Argument.name: expiration
Argument.Description: The expiration date of the token code.

EmailTemplate.Subject: Impersonation token create for identity ${targetDisplayName}

Variable.name: tokenModel
Variable.Description: The model Map used for the token creation form.

Value.String: This wizard allows you to create new tokens and invite people to impersonate, and to manage or remove existing tokens.

Script.Source: Map tokenModel = new HashMap(); return tokenModel;

entry.value: Optionally invite people to use the impersonation token
